infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Celsius Staff uses the camera to scan outlet QR codes when GPS is unavailable, and to capture receipts for expense claims.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Celsius Staff uses your photo library so you can attach existing receipt photos to expense claims.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Celsius Staff uses Face ID to confirm it's you when clocking in or out — Apple handles the biometric check; we never see your face data.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Celsius Staff uses your location to detect which outlet you've arrived at, so clock-in can happen automatically. You can decline and clock in manually.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Celsius Staff uses your location in the background only to auto clock-in when you arrive at your outlet and auto clock-out when you leave. Location is checked at outlet boundaries only — never continuously tracked — and is never used outside of attendance. You can disable this anytime and clock in manually.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Celsius Staff uses your location in the background only to auto clock-in when you arrive at your outlet and auto clock-out when you leave.

web.name: Celsius Staff
web.description: Celsius Coffee staff app — clock in/out, shifts, payslips, leave, claims, checklists.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Celsius Staff uses your location in the background only at outlet boundaries to auto-clock you in and out. You can disable this anytime.

plugins.cameraPermission: Celsius Staff uses the camera to scan outlet QR codes and capture expense receipts.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Celsius Staff uses Face ID to confirm clock-in/out is you.
